name: Persistent Systems MPU5 — Wave Relay Smart Radio
description: The MPU5 is a handheld 3x3 MIMO MANET smart radio running Wave Relay OS (custom Android). Integrates data, video, voice, PTT audio, GPS, and onboard compute in a single ruggedized IP68 unit. Self-forming/self-healing peer-to-peer mesh with no master node, no hop limit, and no node limit. Interchangeable Frequency Module architecture supports L-band through upper C-band. FIPS 140-2 Level 2 validated. Blue UAS certified. Wave Relay IRD provides EW countermeasures assessed by DoD.
encryption: CTR-AES-256, SHA-256 HMAC, FIPS 140-2 Level 2, NSA CSfC approved
max_hops: No limit (38 hops / 31 miles demonstrated subterranean)
ew_capability: Wave Relay IRD — DoD-assessed EW countermeasure library

name: Persistent Systems Embedded Module — SWaP-Optimized MANET for UAS/UGV
description: Low-SWaP version of the MPU5 designed for integration into UAVs, UGVs, and sensors. Same Wave Relay MANET, same IFM architecture, same mesh protocol. Combines communication, computing, and video subsystems into a single 90.7g module. Onboard Android compute enables swarming algorithms and autonomy applications directly on the radio. FIPS 140-2 Level 2 validated. Blue UAS certified. Pre-certified MIL-STD-461 RE102 for EMI/EMC.
form_factor: embedded module (2.00 x 3.29 x 0.59 in / 5.08 x 8.35 x 1.49 cm)
frequency_architecture: Interchangeable Frequency Module (IFM) — stackable or ribbon-cable separated

name: Persistent Systems RF-1100 — L-Band IFM (1350–1390 MHz)
description: L-Band Interchangeable Frequency Module for MPU5 and Embedded Module. Military band (1350–1390 MHz). Longer wavelength provides extended range with omnidirectional antennas — ideal for aviation applications. 3x3 MIMO, 6W aggregate TX power.

name: Persistent Systems RF-1350HP — High Power L-Band IFM
description: High Power L-Band Interchangeable Frequency Module. Delivers increased output power and greater power efficiency for military and overseas customers. Provides increased noise immunity in congested and contested RF environments.

name: Persistent Systems RF-2000 — BAS Band IFM (2025–2150 MHz)
description: Broadcast Auxiliary Service band module for TV/radio stations. Licensed spectrum — no monthly fees. Live event video streaming and electronic newsgathering.

name: Persistent Systems RF-2150 — S-Band IFM (2200–2507 MHz)
description: S-Band Interchangeable Frequency Module covering Federal (2200–2290 MHz), Commercial Licensed (2300–2400 MHz), and ISM (2412–2462 MHz) ranges. FCC Part 15 certified for ISM. Ideal for urban environments where S-Band wavelength provides superior RF reflections and building penetration.
primary_users: Federal, commercial, ISM band users, urban operations

name: Persistent Systems RF-4100 — Lower C-Band IFM (4400–5000 MHz)
description: Lower C-Band module for NATO (4.4–4.6 GHz), Federal/DHS/DOJ (4.6–4.8 GHz), and Public Safety (4.9 GHz) customers. Less congested spectrum than S-Band. Required for multiple UGV Programs of Record.
primary_users: NATO, Federal, Public Safety, UGV programs

name: Persistent Systems RF-5100 — Upper C-Band IFM (5100–6000 MHz)
description: Upper C-Band module for unlicensed ISM band (5.1–5.9 GHz). FCC Part 15 and Japan Type certified. Less congested than 2.4 GHz ISM. 4W aggregate TX power (1.3W per chain). Allows defense customers to blend into commercial 5 GHz traffic in urban areas.
primary_users: Commercial, defense (LPI in urban), UAV operators

name: Persistent Systems GVR5 — Dual-Band Vehicle MANET
description: Dual-band Wave Relay MANET solution for tracked/wheeled ground vehicles and aircraft. Available in C+L, C+S, and L+S band combinations. Integrates with vehicle LAN, intercom, SATCOM/LTE. Two HD video encoders. Hardened against electronic warfare.

name: Doodle Labs Mini OEM — Mesh Rider Radio (2.4 GHz)
description: Compact mesh radio for drone integration. OpenWRT-based with batman-adv mesh protocol. SSH-accessible. Small enough for 5-inch quads. Configurable OGM interval for fast-moving platforms.

name: Doodle Labs Helix Smart Radio — Defense Mesh (L/S/C Band)
description: Defense-grade mesh radio covering L, S, and C bands. MIMO with higher TX power than Mini series. Designed for tactical UAV/UGV operations. OpenWRT platform with enhanced RF front-end.

name: Silvus Technologies StreamCaster SC4200 — MANET Radio
description: Custom MIMO MANET radio with TDMA-based MAC layer for deterministic latency. Up to 100 Mbps throughput. Multicast-aware mesh for video streaming. Strong defense/government customer base. Closed platform — configured via web GUI.

name: Rajant BreadCrumb — Dual-Radio Mesh Node
description: Dual-radio mesh architecture — each node has two radios on different bands for simultaneous TX/RX, avoiding half-duplex throughput penalty. InstaMesh protocol handles mobility. Strong industrial track record (mining, oil & gas).
